connected_accounts.orgs_description: 使用第三方应用程序在 Postman 中配置您的组织。 Postman 组织成员可以使用配置的应用程序来设置集成。
connected_accounts.team_description: 使用第三方应用程序配置 Postman 中的团队。Postman 团队成员可以使用配置的应用程序来设置集成。

manage_invite_links.heading: 邀请链接
manage_invite_links.orgs_description: 用于邀请人员加入您组织的链接。
manage_invite_links.team_description: 用于邀请人员加入您团队的链接。

scim_provisioning.team_description: When enabled, you can effortlessly onboard and manage Postman team members using your identity provider. Learn more about
scim_provisioning.orgs_description: When enabled, you can effortlessly onboard and manage Postman organization members using your identity provider. Learn more about

domain_capture.team_subheading_part1: Domains help determine which accounts can be members of your team and be managed by your Admins. Once verified, you can enable account management for team
domain_capture.orgs_subheading_part1: Domains help determine which accounts can be members of your organization and be managed by your Admins. Once verified, you can enable account management for organization
